description: Sample eSIM data plans: regional, global, and country-specific packages

products.name: Global eSIM — 5GB / 7 Days
products.description: Covers 130+ countries. 5GB data, valid for 7 days. 4G/LTE speeds. QR code delivery.

products.name: Global eSIM — 10GB / 15 Days
products.description: Covers 130+ countries. 10GB data, valid for 15 days. 4G/LTE speeds.

products.name: Europe eSIM — 5GB / 15 Days
products.description: Covers 35 European countries. 5GB data, valid for 15 days. Perfect for Euro trips.

products.name: Asia eSIM — 6GB / 10 Days
products.description: Covers 20+ Asian countries including Japan, Korea, Thailand, Singapore. 6GB / 10 days.

products.name: Japan eSIM — 10GB / 14 Days
products.description: Japan-only eSIM. 10GB data, 14-day validity. NTT Docomo 4G network. Instant QR delivery.

products.name: USA eSIM — 15GB / 30 Days
products.description: USA-only eSIM on T-Mobile/Verizon. 15GB data, 30-day validity. Great for longer US stays.
